features: Depend comfort protect pants for men keep you feeling secure and confident both day and night with a soft, comfortable, discreet fit
Depend total protect system has been specifically tailored with the combination of fast-absorption channels and odour-eliminating filters
Depend incontinence pants for men provide worry-free protection from leaks and odours
Specially made to fit the shape of a man with a pant-like waistband, oval-cut leg openings and fit-flex protection with lycra strands to ensure a smooth fit
Super absorbency, disposable pants have an overnight guarantee and come in a neutral grey colour
description: Product Description Reclaim and reconnect with what matters most in your life. Depend Comfort Protect Incontinence Pants for Men give you more freedom to forget about leaks.* Depend disposable pants feature the Total Protection system that has been specifically tailored with the combination of fast-absorption channels and odour-eliminating filters. Trust in Depend pants for worry-free protection from leaks and odours. Drawing wetness away from the skin, the comfortable, discreet pants have snug, pant-like leg openings with all-around elastics for a close-to-body fit - just step in and pull on. And with the improved waistband for added security, Depend Comfort Protect for Men provide a pant-like fit. Depend incontinence pants are soft, quiet, breathable and discreet. Depend incontinence pants for men are latex-free, lotion-free, fragrance-free and come in a neutral grey colour. Size small/medium fits waist size 28-42 Inches; size large/extra large fits waist size 38-60 Inches. *vs. previous Depend Pants products Directions The Depend men's Comfort-Protect underwear is suitable for men with moderate to severe incontinence. The trousers should be worn like normal underwear and changed when wet. Please refer to the recommended waist size and choose the appropriate size. The trousers are disposable and should be hygienically disposed of after use. Safety Warning For External Use Only Box Contains 1 x Depend Pants Super Large Extra Large Male NEW Manufacturer Contact Information Kimberly-Clark Europe Ltd, 40 London Road, Reigate, Surrey, RH2 9QP, UK. See more
